code: import React,{useState}from'react';import ChatItem from'./ChatItem';import{chats as mockChats}from'../../mocks/chats';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const ChatList=()=>{const[activeId,setActiveId]=useState(null);const handleSelect=chat=>{setActiveId(chat.id);};const handleEdit=chat=>{console.log('edit',chat.id);};const handleDelete=chat=>{console.log('delete',chat.id);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"chat-list",children:mockChats.map(chat=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ChatItem,{chat:chat,active:chat.id===activeId,onClick:()=>handleSelect(chat),onEdit:()=>handleEdit(chat),onDelete:()=>handleDelete(chat)},chat.id))});};export default ChatList;
